description: Portrait photo of a smiling middle-aged man wearing glasses, a navy blazer over a white shirt, and beige trousers, holding a white mug. He is standing against a light background with soft blue geometric shapes. The image is a formal corporate portrait with a clean studio-like look. Visible text in the image includes: "8".

A small circular decorative graphic containing a stylized quotation-mark icon in purple and blue gradients on a white background. It appears to function as a visual accent near a pull quote. No other text is visible.
